name: LIC HFL Social Trailblazer Program
description: Incubation partner program focused on social impact, MVP, and early-revenue startups.
criticalEligibility: Must possess valid NGO Darpan ID (NITI Aayog)
TBI must demonstrate a specialization in social impact ventures
Founding team must not have political or religious affiliations

name: IDFC FIRST Bank IGNITE Accelerator
description: Corporate-backed growth accelerator partnering with academic TBIs like IITs/IIMs.
criticalEligibility: 3-Year established track record in incubation activities
Mandatory selection/due-diligence committee for startups
Must have audited financials for last 3 financial years

name: Kotak BizLabs Accelerator (Velocity & IRP)
description: Implementation partnership with specialized TBIs to run growth-stage and investor readiness cohorts.
criticalEligibility: CSR-1 Registration (MCA SRN) is non-negotiable
Must hold valid 12A and 80G tax registrations
Minimum track record of handling high-value grant disbursements

name: Infosys Social Innovation & Entrepreneurship CSR
description: Partnership with Section 8 TBIs for implementing social innovation and skills development programs.
criticalEligibility: Must be a registered Section 8 company/Trust/Society
Mandatory impact assessment reports for local CSR committees
Must have strict mechanisms for fund ring-fencing

name: MeitY TIDE 2.0
description: Support for tech-driven startups in Society-linked sectors (IoT, AI, Robotics).
criticalEligibility: Group 1/2 centers must be Section 8/25 entities
Minimum 2-3 years of operational experience required for higher tiers
Mandatory industry collaborations/tie-ups
Specific focus on societal areas identified by MeitY

name: NIDHI-Technology Business Incubator (NIDHI-TBI)
description: Establishment and support grant for Knowledge-based and technology-driven startups.
criticalEligibility: Minimum 20,000 sq. ft. furnished space with 30-year lease
Host Institute must take financial responsibility after 5 years
Must be registered strictly as a not-for-profit (Section 8/Society/Trust)
Capacity to incubate at least 30 ventures simultaneously

name: Startup India Seed Fund Scheme (SISFS) - Incubator Grant
description: Grant for eligible incubators to disburse seed funds to early-stage startups.
criticalEligibility: Must have physical facility to seat at least 25 individuals
At least 5 startups undergoing physical incubation (10 if not govt-assisted)
Cannot disburse seed funds from third-party private entities
Must have full-time CEO with experience in business development

name: BIRAC–Social Alpha Assistive Tech Quest
description: Joint programme to discover and scale innovations in assistive technologies for persons with disabilities.
criticalEligibility: Prototype must be at TRL 4 or higher
Lead applicant must be a DPIIT-recognized startup
Previous awardees of BIRAC-Social Alpha cannot apply

name: NIDHI-iTBI (Inclusive-TBI)
description: Inclusive TBI programme focusing on Tier-2/3 cities and underserved regions.

name: TIDE 2.0
description: Technology Incubation and Development of Entrepreneurs — MeitY ICT incubation programme.

name: NIDHI-TBI
description: National Initiative for Developing and Harnessing Innovations — TBI grant for institutional incubators.

name: NIDHI-EIR
description: Entrepreneur In Residence fellowship for innovators to work full-time on their startup idea.

name: Atal Incubation Centre (AIC)
description: Atal Innovation Mission funds Atal Incubation Centres at institutions to incubate startups in emerging sectors.

name: MSME Incubation Scheme
description: Technology Incubation and Development of Enterprises scheme for business incubation support.

name: India Agritech Incubation Network
description: Gates Foundation-backed agritech incubation network supporting solutions for smallholder farmers.

name: Rockefeller Foundation Global Impact Incubator
description: Rockefeller Foundation supports incubators working on food, health, and energy systems globally.

name: Clean Energy International Incubation Centre
description: CEIIC supports clean energy innovators through mentorship, funding, and market linkages.

name: thingQbator
description: IoT-focused incubator by NASSCOM Foundation and Cisco CSR supporting tech-for-good startups.

name: Krishi Mangal
description: Accelerates agritech innovations for small and marginal farmers through Social Alpha and Cisco.

name: SBI Foundation – Innovators for Bharat
description: Innovators for Bharat supports social innovators with funding, mentorship, and market linkages.

name: Startup India Seed Fund Scheme (SISFS)
description: [Automated Source] Financial assistance to startups for proof of concept, prototype development, product trials, market entry, and commercialization.

name: MeitY TIDE 2.0 (Incubator Support)
description: Technology Incubation and Development of Entrepreneurs providing financial/technical support to incubators supporting ICT startups.

name: STPI Next Generation Incubation Scheme (NGIS) / LEAP Ahead
description: Incubation facilities, seed funding edge, and mentorship for startups in Tier II/III cities via local STPI centers.

name: India Investment Grid (IIG) – CSR Opportunities Portal
description: Official portal connecting Section 8 Incubators with corporate CSR mandates. Incubators can list projects to secure 2% CSR grants.

name: MANAGE-CIA Agri-Business Incubation
description: Comprehensive incubation program offering mentorship, infrastructure, and financial grants for agri-startups.

name: MANAGE-CIA RKVY-RAFTAAR Agribusiness Incubation
description: Grant-in-aid to support agribusiness startups for product development and scaling under the RAFTAAR scheme.

name: HDFC Bank Parivartan Start-up Grants (FY26)
description: CSR funding for social impact startups focusing on education, healthcare, and rural development.

name: Atal Incubation Centre (AIC) Grant
description: Establishment grant for new incubation centres to support the Indian innovation ecosystem.

name: DST NIDHI - TBI Support
description: National initiative for developing and harnessing innovations via Technology Business Incubators.

name: IIG - CSR Opportunities Portal
description: Official portal connecting Section 8 Incubators with corporate CSR mandates.
